commit.message:
fix: remove libva from Media-Server opengl extraPackages to fix Plex

libva in hardware.graphics.extraPackages causes Plex to crash with
__isoc23_sscanf symbol not found — glibc 2.38+ symbol in nixpkgs libva
conflicts with Plex's bundled runtime. Mesa (via hardware.graphics.enable)
already provides VAAPI for AMD. Moved libva-utils to system packages only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Replace Reddit (403) with Hacker News + Dev.to community feeds

Reddit blocks all requests from GitHub Actions datacenter IPs with 403.
Replace with cloud-accessible sources:

- Hacker News via hnrss.org: search-filtered feeds for "claude code" and
  "anthropic claude", 7-day window, 20 items per feed
- Dev.to: tag feeds for claudeai and anthropic, 7-day window
- Keep GitHub Releases (72h window, max 3 items)

Community items (HN + Dev.to) sorted by content richness and capped at 12,
shown before GitHub Releases. Dedup by URL.

DeepSeek prompts tailored per source type:
- HN: extract discussion topic, community insights, developer takeaways
- Dev.to: extract use case, approach, actionable tips
- GitHub: existing release notes summary

Frontend: add hackernews/devto/github-release icons and category labels.

commit.message:
Security hardening and correctness fixes for bot subsystem

- Fix SSRF bypass via IPv4-mapped IPv6 (::ffff:127.0.0.1)
- Fix DNS rebinding TOCTOU: connect to resolved IP, not re-resolved hostname
- Fix redacted secrets (***configured***) being re-encrypted on edit
- Fix EnrichmentBot reading wrong IOC: use event.data directly
- Fix event filter bypass: reject events without folderId when folder filter set
- Fix double rate-limit consumption on queued executions (extract executeBotInner)
- Remove duplicate event emission (only emit wildcard *)
- Remove tag-based scope type from schema and types
- Make deleteBot transactional
- Add type validation to validateBotUpdate
- Use .returning() in enableBot/disableBot to eliminate extra SELECT
- Cache decrypted config at load time instead of per-execution
- Add LIMIT to searchAcrossInvestigations
- Protect against concurrent init() calls
- Add isPrivateIP SSRF boundary tests (IPv4, IPv6, mapped addresses)
- Add sentinel value preservation tests
- Add event routing and stats tests

commit.message:
Fix matching: upgrade nearby confidence when REF='N', keep OR-null results

Two issues causing 0 results after filtering:

1. Strategy 5 nearby (±1bp) matches had 'very_low' confidence.
   When GWAS REF is 'N' (unknown) and ALT matches user alleles,
   upgrade to 'medium' — likely a coordinate system offset.

2. Odds Ratio filter was dropping rows with missing OR via dropna().
   Many GWAS entries lack OR; keep them instead of discarding.

commit.message:
perf: view pipeline, memo optimization, fuse.js removal, dead code cleanup (#14)

- View engine: 5-stage pure pipeline (context→filter→search→sort→group)
  with per-stage memoization via useNotesView hook
- NoteRow: React.memo with 12-field custom comparator
- backlinksMap: shallow comparison to prevent unnecessary rerenders
- Sort: ISO string comparison replacing Date object allocation
- noteEvents: per-note bounding (max 1000) to prevent persist slowdown
- fuse.js removed: Links mode migrated to Worker-based FlexSearch
- Dead code: removed extractWikiLinks, buildBacklinksMap, countBacklinks,
  stripMarkdown (all zero callers)
- Editor: current line highlight extension, focus/typewriter mode settings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(config,review,debate): add tier-based tool selection for review and debate commands (#363)

* feat(config,review,debate): add tier-based tool selection for review and debate commands

When `tier` is configured in [review] or [debate] config sections, the
commands resolve their tool from the specified tier's models list:

- Filter by enabled + binary available
- Prefer heterogeneous model (different ModelFamily from parent tool)
- Use the tier entry's model_spec (carries model name + thinking budget)
- Tier takes priority over explicit `tool` when both are set

Key implementation details:
- TierToolResolution struct and resolve_tool_from_tier() in run_helpers.rs
- resolve_review_tool/resolve_debate_tool return model_spec from tier
- build_executor now applies explicit thinking override even when model_spec
  is present (CLI > config > tier spec precedence)
- Multi-reviewer mode only passes tier_model_spec to the matching reviewer,
  preserving cognitive diversity for heterogeneous reviewers
- Validation ensures tier references exist in config

Persist sessions: explicit localStorage auth + 7-day JWT expiry

- supabase.ts: set persistSession=true, autoRefreshToken=true,
  detectSessionInUrl=true, storageKey='bhava-auth' explicitly
- Supabase project: jwt_exp updated to 604800s (7 days, server max)
  with refresh_token_rotation_enabled=true
- autoRefreshToken silently extends login on every app open,
  keeping users logged in indefinitely for daily check-in use

fix: preserve provider metadata and fix tool-result persistence race (#35)

* fix: preserve provider metadata and fix tool-result persistence race

Move title generation await after message save in persistStreamResults
to prevent tool-result continuations from failing when the assistant
message isn't in the DB yet. Persist callProviderMetadata (e.g., Gemini
thoughtSignature) through DB serialization so tool-result continuations
don't lose required provider-specific fields. Surface tool-result errors
in a persistent error modal instead of an auto-dismissing toast.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: extract provider metadata helpers in message-mapping

Replace 10 inline conditional-spread patterns with serializeProviderMeta
and deserializeProviderMeta helpers for the SDK↔DB field rename.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: strip unresolvable inline citations instead of rendering broken badges

When search fails (e.g., Tavily rate limit) or the model hallucinates
citation IDs, raw [n](#id) markdown was passing through to the renderer
as clickable #anchor badges. Remove the early return in processCitations
so the regex always runs and strips unresolvable citations. Add defense
in depth in CitationLink to hide #anchor badges. Fix chat mode citation
numbering to match research mode, and include no-citation guidance in
search error messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: persist provider metadata for dynamic-tool parts

Add serializeProviderMeta to the dynamic-tool write path so
callProviderMetadata (e.g., Gemini thoughtSignature) is preserved
through DB serialization — consistent with all other tool cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

The /api/v1/logs/recent endpoint returned raw error records with fields
like severity, error_message, last_seen. The frontend expects LogEntry
shape with level, message, timestamp. Added field mapping in the route.

* feat: fix classifier routing, job admin, and agent persona consistency

- Rewrite classifier prompt to reliably detect scheduling intent; any
  time delay now routes to scheduled_once/recurring instead of immediate
- Add job_list and job_cancel response types with ListPending/Cancel on
  Store (SQLiteStore + FakeStore)
- Scheduled jobs now emit a confirmation bubble ("Got it — I'll respond
  in ~Xs.") instead of silently returning done

  all responses (live and async) stay in character as the named agent

commit.message:
fix: hoist SafeAreaProvider to root to eliminate layout shift on load

Moving GestureHandlerRootView and SafeAreaProvider from inside the
conditionally-rendered RootLayoutNav to the always-mounted RootLayout
default export prevents insets from resetting to zero during the
splash→loading→app transition, eliminating the visible content jump.

Adds 4 tests in '__tests__/app/_layout.test.tsx' (Safe Area - No Layout
Shift) that assert SafeAreaProvider and GestureHandlerRootView remain
mounted throughout every phase of the startup lifecycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

ci: fix OOM by moving renderer-only deps to devDependencies

Packages bundled by vite (monaco-editor, react, react-dom, etc.) were
listed as production dependencies, so npm prune left them in node_modules
for electron-builder to scan — causing a JS heap OOM. Moving them to
devDependencies ensures they are pruned before the module scan. Also
upgrades Node to 22 to satisfy @electron/rebuild and node-abi engine
requirements.

- Fix speed drill resume not marking already-answered questions in navigator

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial mm-starter-hq: Cloudflare infra, feedback pipeline, system integrity

- Cloudflare Worker (mm-feedback) at feedback.middle-management.ai
  - /register, /report, /health endpoints with KV storage
- HQ scripts: cf.sh (8 Cloudflare API commands), ingest.sh (report processing)
- SQLite schema: user_registry, incoming_reports, report_imps, releases, sync_state
- System integrity protection: manifest, integrity-check, protection hook, restore
- Manifest generator for release-time hash verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(macau): remove Back button overlapping gnav links

← Back was position:fixed z-index:200, blocking Hub/Property links.
Removed entirely — gnav "Travel" link serves the same purpose.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: trip-planner
repository.description: Personal Trip Planner Dashboard

commit.message:
fix: use camelCase mergedAt key in merged PR JSON response (#1859)

The frontend (api.js, ChannelPrList.svelte) reads `pr.mergedAt` but the
backend serialized it as `merged_at` (snake_case), causing the merged
column to always show '—'.

- Extract `parse_merged_prs()` from `fetch_prs_all()` for testability
- Change JSON key from `merged_at` to `mergedAt`
- Add regression test verifying camelCase key

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
